message:
refactor(status): tighten comments on velocity-vs-prompt priority in state detection

Clean up the comment blocks in determineState to more precisely
document the velocity-first, prompt-second priority chain:
- Remove redundant block comment above the user-pane heuristic
  (the logic was already documented by the velocity check below)
- Reword the !isLowVelocity comment to explain why activity
  signal is trusted over prompt-like patterns
- Simplify the isAtPrompt safety-net comment to note it's
  defensive against future reordering of the checks above

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
